question: A 72-year-old woman with RUQ pain after eating fatty meal. Positive Murphy sign. Ultrasound shows gallbladder wall thickening and pericholecystic fluid.

explanation.why_correct: RUQ pain + Murphy sign + US findings = cholecystitis. Laparoscopic cholecystectomy within 72h.

why_wrong.Biliary Colic: Colic has transient pain, normal US.
why_wrong.Choledocholithiasis: CBD stone has dilated CBD + elevated bilirubin.
why_wrong.Pancreatitis: Pancreatitis has epigastric pain + elevated lipase.
why_wrong.Hepatitis: Hepatitis has diffuse tenderness + elevated LFTs.

question: A 35-year-old woman with RUQ pain after eating fatty meal. Positive Murphy sign. Ultrasound shows gallbladder wall thickening and pericholecystic fluid.

explanation.why_correct: RUQ pain + Murphy sign + US findings = cholecystitis. Laparoscopic cholecystectomy within 72h.

why_wrong.Biliary Colic: Colic has transient pain, normal US.
why_wrong.Choledocholithiasis: CBD stone has dilated CBD + elevated bilirubin.
why_wrong.Pancreatitis: Pancreatitis has epigastric pain + elevated lipase.
why_wrong.Hepatitis: Hepatitis has diffuse tenderness + elevated LFTs.

question: A 72-year-old man with periumbilical pain migrating to RLQ over 12 hours. Anorexia, nausea. McBurney point tenderness. WBC 14,500.

explanation.why_correct: Migrating pain to RLQ + McBurney point + leukocytosis = appendicitis. CT confirms.

why_wrong.Mesenteric Adenitis: Mesenteric adenitis follows URI, less localized tenderness.
why_wrong.Ectopic: Ectopic has adnexal mass + positive hCG.
why_wrong.Stone: Ureteral stone has flank pain + hematuria.
